message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.2.9 → 0.3.0 (crates.io v0.3.0)

- crates/ftui-runtime/Cargo.toml: `asupersync = { version = "0.2.9",
  optional = true }` → `{ version = "0.3.0", optional = true }`.
  Used only when the `asupersync-executor` feature is enabled.
- Cargo.lock is gitignored (.gitignore:11) so the refresh isn't
  committed; a fresh build will regenerate it against crates.io v0.3.0.
